title: Drums of Fu Manchu
writer: Sax Rohmer, Franklin Adreon, Morgan Cox
actors: Henry Brandon, William Royle, Robert Kellard
plot: The nefarious Dr. Fu Manchu searches for the keys to the tomb of Genghis Khan, in order to fulfill a prophecy that will enable him to conquer the world. His nemesis, Dr. Nayland Smith, and his associates fight to keep the evil doc...
